user.title: Orphan Entity Cleaner
user.description: Configure the orphan entity detection parameters.

scan.name: Scan orphan entities
scan.description: Scans the registry and returns orphan entities as an event.

delete_orphans.name: Delete orphan entities
delete_orphans.description: Deletes the specified orphan entities (or all if none specified).

entity_ids.name: Entity IDs
entity_ids.description: List of entity_ids to delete. If omitted, all detected orphans are deleted.

dry_run.name: Dry run
dry_run.description: If true, simulates the operation without making any changes.
